title: Custom Hooks, Debounce, and Responsive Dashboard
mission: Build reusable layouts and custom hooks.
description: Enhance your Day 05 dashboard with useDebounce search, theme toggle, and responsive sidebar/navbar. Extract hooks and layout logic for reuse before tomorrow's machine coding round.
requirements: Create useDebounce<T>(value: T, delay: number): T with useEffect timer and cleanup
Search bar in navbar or dashboard using debounced value (300ms) to filter or fetch
Create useTheme or equivalent hook toggling light/dark with localStorage persistence
Apply theme via document.documentElement class or data-theme attribute
Responsive sidebar: visible on desktop, collapsible drawer or overlay on mobile
Hamburger button on mobile toggles sidebar visibility
Navbar composes search, theme toggle, and title without duplicating Day 05 markup
Type custom hook return values explicitly in TypeScript
acceptanceCriteria: Typing in search does not fire API/filter on every keystroke — only after debounce delay
Theme persists after page refresh via localStorage
Sidebar usable at 375px width — no horizontal scroll from fixed sidebar
useDebounce clears timeout on unmount — no setState on unmounted component warnings
Dashboard routes still work from Day 05
hints: useDebounce: useEffect(() => { const id = setTimeout(() => setDebounced(value), delay); return () => clearTimeout(id); }, [value, delay]);
Fetch or filter in separate useEffect depending on debouncedQuery, not raw input.
useTheme: read localStorage on init, sync class on documentElement when theme changes.
Keep hooks in src/hooks/ — one file per hook.

bonus.title: useMediaQuery hook
requirements: Auto-close mobile sidebar when resizing to desktop

debuggingScenarios.title: Hook dependency issues
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Debounce never updates or updates too often
debuggingScenarios.cause: Missing value or delay in useEffect deps; unstable delay object
debuggingScenarios.fix: Include [value, delay] in dependency array; pass number literal or memoized delay

debuggingScenarios.title: Duplicate logic
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Two components copy same setTimeout debounce pattern
debuggingScenarios.fix: Move to hooks/useDebounce.ts; import in SearchBar and anywhere else needed

debuggingScenarios.title: Mobile layout broken
debuggingScenarios.symptom: Sidebar covers content and cannot dismiss
debuggingScenarios.cause: Fixed width sidebar without overlay toggle on small screens
debuggingScenarios.fix: Add isSidebarOpen state, hamburger toggle, backdrop click to close, media query styles
